title: The Colosseum Pressure Builds
description: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Marines, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #20 as luffy and Chinjao fight with the weight of Garp’s past behind them, while Dressrosa’s hidden conflicts keep expanding outside the arena.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: O!! he's already lost conscious- Ness!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why does he just keep punching !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I was holding him for you

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: That bastard called me a shrimp!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Hey, Bobby, you think I'm shrimpy!!? Huh, do ya!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Not at all, bro. You're real big

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Try sayin' something now, you octopus!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ah!! I was holding him down for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Next time I'll gouge out your damn eyes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And you came over to stop me, didn't you Bobby!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But this is a match, bro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's the excessively violent funk brothers!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: They're a pair of killers known by all involved in the underworld!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's said that they're strong enough

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: To even take down pirates with Bounties over 100 MLN !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: All these noisy guys... just how many street fighters and boxers

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Without any formal training are there?

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: No... or maybe it's just that that Happou Navy's Boo is too strong....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: What a failure to live up to expecta- tions!! Where's the impressive fighter we were promised!! What a fool!

summary: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
